name: Date and Nut Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square pan.
3. Beat the eggs until foamy.
4. Add sugar and vanilla extract, beating until well combined.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the egg mixture.
7. Mix in the dates and chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top has a dull crust.
10. Allow to cool in the pan.
11. If desired, dust with powdered sugar before serving.
